ranges.notes: Cold winter weather, temperatures often below freezing. Few tourists, city is quiet but some local celebrations on January 6th.
Cold and often gray weather, minimal events and attractions open for tourists. Low daylight hours reduce sightseeing opportunities.
Still cold but occasional sunny days. Museums and thermal baths are good indoor activities. Very low tourism means peaceful experience.
Cold with some possibility of snow. Few events but thermal spas and indoor cultural sites remain good options.
Cold weather but romantic atmosphere for couples. Some special dinners and events in local restaurants.
Local festivities with costumes and parades. Weather still cold but cultural experience is enriching. Moderate crowds.
Early spring with gradually warming temperatures. Some rainy days but increasing daylight and outdoor possibilities.
City hosts commemorations and small events. Spring weather improving, good time for sightseeing with moderate visitor numbers.
Spring is in full swing, mild weather with blooming nature. Ideal for outdoor activities and exploring the Old Town and riverside.
Easter celebrations with traditional markets and church events. Pleasant spring weather encourages outdoor exploration.
Mild temperatures and longer daylight hours. Good time for bike rides and visiting parks and nearby nature reserves.
Annual cultural festival with concerts, theater, and exhibitions. Mild weather and vibrant atmosphere attract many visitors.
Public holiday with local fairs and outdoor events. Pleasant spring weather with mild temperatures and blooming gardens.
Excellent spring weather, lots of outdoor activities including river walks and cycling paths. Low rain and comfortable temperatures.
Popular music festival with international artists. Pleasant weather and lively city atmosphere increase visitor enjoyment.
Early summer with warm, pleasant days ideal for sightseeing and outdoor cafes. Moderate tourist crowds before peak season.
City starts hosting summer cultural and music events. Warm weather and long days enhance the visitor experience.
High summer with warm to hot weather. Some days can be uncomfortably hot. Tourist crowds increase but city is lively.

ranges.event: Sziget Festival (Budapest nearby, affects regional tourism)
ranges.notes: Many young travelers attend Sziget Festival in Budapest, reducing local crowds in Győr. Hot weather and fewer local events.
National holiday with fireworks and celebrations in Győr. Warm summer weather and lively atmosphere make it a good visit time.
Peak summer heat can be intense with occasional thunderstorms. Tourist numbers remain high but some local quiet pockets are available.
Early fall with mild weather and beautiful foliage. The Wine Festival offers excellent cultural and gastronomic experiences.
Comfortable temperatures and fewer tourists than summer. Ideal for riverside walks, cycling, and exploring historic sites.
Commemorative events with moderate tourist activity. Autumn colors enhance the city’s charm. Weather cools but remains pleasant.
Cooler, sometimes rainy weather. Tourist crowds drop. Good time for indoor museums and thermal baths but less ideal for outdoor activities.
Chilly and often gray weather with short daylight. Few events and low tourist activity. Indoor attractions recommended.
Often cold and damp. Low tourist numbers but city atmosphere is quiet. Thermal baths and museums are main attractions.
Beginning of festive season with Christmas markets starting mid-month. Cold weather but growing festive atmosphere.
City center hosts charming Christmas markets with local crafts and food. Cold but festive, attracting moderate crowds.
Holiday celebrations with special church services and city events. Cold and often snowy weather, festive but some services close.
